_comment: EXAMPLE / SAMPLE ONLY - not a real plan. Illustrates a filled-in tasks.json for the 'Password reset via email' feature. Copy ../tasks.json (the blank template) for real work. Note how T2/T3 are parallel (independent files) while T4/T5 depend on earlier tasks.

tasks.title: Add password_reset_tokens table + migration (hashed token, expires_at, used_at)
tasks.acceptance: Token is single-use and expires after 30 min

tasks.title: TokenService: generate 256-bit token, store hash, validate + consume
tasks.acceptance: Token expires after 30 min and is single-use (410 on reuse)

tasks.title: EmailQueue: enqueue reset email async (no inline send)
tasks.acceptance: forgot-password returns < 300ms p95; email queued not inline

tasks.title: POST /auth/reset-password (argon2id rehash, invalidate all sessions, enforce policy)
tasks.acceptance: Valid token resets pw, logs out other sessions; weak pw -> 422
